final:
// // This module is designed to store a single bit of data in a DRAM cell. It has an input (DATA) for writing the bit, a control signal (WRITE_ENABLE) to enable writing, and an output (Q) to read the stored bit. Additionally, it includes a PRECHARGE signal to set the data to 1 when active.
module dram_cell (
    input wire DATA,
    input wire WRITE_ENABLE,
    input wire PRECHARGE,
    output reg Q
);
    
    always @(posedge WRITE_ENABLE or posedge PRECHARGE) begin
        if (PRECHARGE)
            Q <= 1'b0; // Reset data to 0
        else
            Q <= DATA; // Store data on WRITE_ENABLE
    end
endmodule

It has an input (DATA) for writing the bit, a control signal (WRITE_ENABLE) to enable writing, and an output (Q) to read the stored bit. Additionally, it includes a PRECHARGE signal to set the data to 1 when active.
